narrative:
Washington Twp (precinct in Harrison County) has 337 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.6%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.5 percentage points.
